common.pasteUrl: Paste a YouTube URL and start downloading.

home.heroTitle:
Download YouTube, TikTok
& Twitch videos and music.
home.heroDesc: The open-source downloader for YouTube, TikTok and Twitch. Get a plain video or audio file, download TikTok without watermark, grab Twitch clips, or pick <libraryReady>Library Ready</libraryReady> (YouTube) for a fully tagged MP3 with cover art, ID3 tags and synced lyrics.
home.heroDisclaimer: Please only download content you own or have the rights to.
home.ytHeroTitle:
Download YouTube videos
as MP4, MP3 or Library Ready.
home.ytHeroDesc: The open-source YouTube downloader. Get a plain video or audio file or pick <libraryReady>Library Ready</libraryReady> and receive a fully tagged MP3 with cover art, ID3 tags and synced lyrics, ready for your favourite music player. No browser extension, no desktop app, no signup.
home.ytHeroDisclaimer: Please only download content you own or have the rights to.
home.ytStep1Body: Copy the link from any YouTube video — desktop, mobile app, or Shorts. Drop it in the search field above.
home.howItWorksTitle: From URL to file in three steps, no install.
home.howItWorksDesc: No browser extension, no desktop app, no signup. Everything runs in your tab.
home.step1Title: Paste the YouTube or TikTok URL
home.step1Body: Copy the link from any YouTube video, TikTok, or Twitch clip — desktop, mobile app, or Shorts. Drop it in the search field above.
home.step2Title: Pick MP4, MP3 or Library Ready
home.step2Body: MP4 keeps the video at source resolution (up to 4K). MP3 is audio-only at 190 kbps. Library Ready is the unique option: cover art, ID3 tags and synced lyrics embedded — ready for Apple Music, Plex or your favourite music player.
home.step3Body: The file streams from our converter directly to your browser. Nothing is stored on our servers. Only download content you have the rights to.
home.formatsDesc: Video stays at source resolution — we don't transcode. Audio at constant 190 kbps.
home.formatsDisclaimer: Video resolution is inherited from the YouTube source. We never upscale or re-encode the picture stream.
home.formatLibraryReadyDesc: MP3 at 190 kbps with cover art, title, artist, album, year and synced lyrics baked in. Drops cleanly into Apple Music, Plex, Rekordbox, foobar2000 or your favourite music player.
home.formatMp4Desc: Full video at the source resolution YouTube serves — 360p, 720p, 1080p, 1440p or 2160p when the original has it. We never upscale or re-encode the picture.
home.formatMp3Desc: Audio-only extract at a constant 190 kbps. Perfect for podcasts, lectures, and study material you want to listen to offline.
home.formatTiktokDesc: Download TikTok videos without the watermark at source resolution, or grab the audio track as MP3. No app required.
home.formatTwitchDesc: Download Twitch clips without any app. Pick source quality, 720p60, or audio-only MP3. No account needed.
home.faq1A: Yes — fully free, unlimited downloads, no signup. The project is open source under the MIT license and runs on a small server in the EU. If you want to help, the GitHub repo accepts contributions.
home.faq2A: It depends on your jurisdiction and what you download. StroyGetter is intended for personal use of content you own, public-domain content, or content explicitly licensed for download. Only download what you have the right to.
home.faq3Q: Why does Library Ready conversion take longer?
home.faq3A: We make a second call to fetch metadata (artist, album, lyrics) from open music databases, fetch the high-resolution cover art from YouTube Music, and embed everything into the ID3 tags. The whole roundtrip usually adds 15–25 seconds.
home.faq4Q: Do you store the videos on your servers?
home.faq4A: No. Files are not permanently stored — converted files expire and are cleaned up automatically within 7 days. Our analytics only counts anonymous page views.
home.faq5A: Any modern browser released after 2023. We test on Chrome, Firefox, Safari and Edge. Mobile Safari and Chrome on Android also work.
home.faq6Q: Can I download age-restricted or private videos?
home.faq6A: No — we only handle videos that are publicly available without a YouTube login. Age-restricted videos that require sign-in cannot be fetched.
home.faqTiktok1A: Yes — the 'No watermark' option downloads the original video stream without the overlaid TikTok logo. Go to stroygetter.fr/tiktok for the dedicated TikTok downloader.
home.faqTiktok2A: Standard TikTok URLs (tiktok.com/@user/video/ID) and short links (vm.tiktok.com/…) are both supported. Just paste the link.
home.glossaryDesc: Quick definitions of the technical terms used on this page.

getterInput.placeholder: Paste a YouTube or TikTok URL, or search…
getterInput.errorNotFound: No video found. Try a different search or paste a YouTube URL directly.
getterInput.errorClipboard: Please paste manually or grant clipboard permission
getterInput.errorTwitchVodDisabled: StroyGetter's current hosting capacity doesn't support multi-hour Twitch VOD downloads. Clips only for now.
getterInput.errorPlatformDisabled: This platform is not enabled on this instance.

videoSelect.libraryReadyCalloutTitle: Library Ready · metadata from YouTube Music
videoSelect.libraryReadyCalloutDesc: Cover art 1400×1400, ID3 tags, synced lyrics · adds ~20s to processing.
videoSelect.converting: Converting… please wait and do not close the tab.
videoSelect.disclaimer: Streamed directly to your device. Nothing stored on our servers. Only download content you own or have the rights to.
videoSelect.errorDownload: An error occurred while downloading. Please try again.
videoSelect.errorFetch: An error occurred while fetching video info.
videoSelect.errorAgeRestricted: StroyGetter doesn't support private or age-restricted videos yet.
videoSelect.eduCard1Desc: MP3 with embedded cover art, ID3 tags (title, artist, album, year) and synced lyrics. Drops cleanly into Apple Music, Plex, Rekordbox.
videoSelect.eduCard2Desc: We fetch the source from YouTube live and tag it on the fly. Library Ready adds 15–25s because we look up metadata and high-res cover art.
videoSelect.eduCard3Title: MP4 vs MP3 vs Library Ready
videoSelect.eduCard3Desc: MP4 keeps the picture. MP3 keeps only the sound. Library Ready is MP3 + everything your music app needs to display the track properly.
videoSelect.eduCardTiktok1Desc: yt-dlp fetches TikTok's original H264 stream before the logo is overlaid. You get a clean MP4 with no TikTok branding.
videoSelect.eduCardTiktok2Desc: TikTok only publishes one video resolution per clip. yt-dlp picks the best available automatically — there's nothing to choose.
videoSelect.eduCardTiktok3Desc: No watermark and Watermark give you the full MP4 video. Audio strips the sound track and exports it as a plain MP3.
videoSelect.eduCardTwitch1Desc: Clips are short highlights (up to 60s) that anyone can create from a live stream or VOD. They're hosted by Twitch and available as long as the streamer keeps them.
videoSelect.eduCardTwitch2Desc: Twitch clips offer multiple resolutions. Source quality matches the original broadcast, typically 1080p60. Pick the highest your device can handle.
videoSelect.eduCardTwitch3Desc: Audio MP3 strips the video track and exports the stream audio as a 192 kbps MP3 — useful for podcasts, music streams, or just listening on the go.

footer.tagline: Free, open-source YouTube & TikTok downloader. No signup, no ads, no installs. Download MP4 video or MP3 audio directly from your browser.
footer.learnHowTo: How to download a YouTube video
footer.copyright: © {year} StroyCo · For personal & educational use only.

libraryReady.heroDesc: Cover art, ID3 tags and synced lyrics embedded in one click. Drop the file into Apple Music, Plex, Rekordbox, foobar2000 or your favourite music player — and everything shows up exactly as it should. No manual editing, ever.
libraryReady.featuresTitle: Everything your music player needs, already inside the file.
libraryReady.feature1Desc: Pulled from YouTube Music in the highest resolution available. Your album grid looks exactly like it should in every player.
libraryReady.feature2Desc: Song title, artist, album name and year are auto-detected and embedded. No more "Unknown Artist" entries cluttering your library.
libraryReady.feature3Desc: Time-coded lyrics from LRClib are embedded as SYLT tags. The words scroll in sync with the music — just like on streaming platforms.
libraryReady.feature4Desc: Drop the file into Apple Music, Plex, Rekordbox, foobar2000, or any music player you love. It just works, no manual editing required.
libraryReady.whyTitle: A plain MP3 is just a file. Library Ready is a track.
libraryReady.whyP1: When you download a bare MP3 from most tools, you get an unnamed file with no artwork, no artist info and no lyrics. Open it in Apple Music and it lands in <unknownArtist>Unknown Artist → Unknown Album</unknownArtist>, buried where you'll never find it again.
libraryReady.whyP2: Library Ready fixes all of that automatically. The metadata is pulled from YouTube Music's catalog, the cover art is fetched in the highest resolution available, and the synced lyrics come from LRClib — an open, community-maintained database. The file is indistinguishable from a proper store purchase.
libraryReady.whyP3: It works with every player you love — Apple Music, Plex, Plexamp, Rekordbox, foobar2000, Poweramp, Strawberry or whatever player is your daily driver. If it reads ID3 tags, Library Ready speaks its language.
libraryReady.compareTitle: Without Library Ready vs. with it
libraryReady.compareSection: No other free online downloader does this.
libraryReady.faq1Q: How long does Library Ready take?
libraryReady.faq1A: Usually 20–35 seconds. We make an extra call to fetch the metadata and high-res artwork, then run ffmpeg to embed everything. A plain MP3 is faster because we skip that step.
libraryReady.faq2Q: What if no lyrics are found?
libraryReady.faq2A: You still get the full ID3 tags and cover art. Lyrics come from LRClib — an open database. Some tracks aren't indexed yet, but the file is never incomplete.
libraryReady.faq3A: Apple Music (macOS/iOS), Plexamp, foobar2000 with a plugin, Poweramp on Android, and most modern audiophile players. Standard players like VLC will still show the tags and artwork even if they don't scroll the lyrics.
libraryReady.faq4A: We match against YouTube Music's catalog, which covers the vast majority of official music releases. For unofficial uploads, covers or mixes the match may be partial — you'll get whatever data YouTube Music has.
libraryReady.ctaTitle: Try Library Ready now — it's free.
libraryReady.ctaDesc: Paste any YouTube music link and pick Library Ready. Your track will be library-perfect in under a minute.

howToDownload.h1: How to download a YouTube video as MP4 or MP3 in 2026
howToDownload.intro: A free, no-install walkthrough using StroyGetter — the open-source YouTube downloader. Works on Chrome, Firefox, Safari and any modern mobile browser.
howToDownload.prereqDesc: Nothing exotic. A modern web browser, the URL of the YouTube video you want to keep, and somewhere to save the file. No account, no payment, no installer, no browser extension.
howToDownload.prereq1: A YouTube video URL (any public video — Shorts work too)
howToDownload.prereq2: A browser released after 2023 — Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, mobile Safari, Chrome on Android
howToDownload.prereq3: About 100 MB of free space for 1080p, or 5 MB for an MP3
howToDownload.step1Body: On desktop, click the address bar at the top of your browser and copy the full URL with {cmdC} (Mac) or {ctrlC} (Windows). On the YouTube mobile app, tap the {share} button under the video and pick {copyLink}. Either way, the URL should start with {urlDesktop} or {urlMobile}.
howToDownload.step2Body: Open {siteUrl}, paste the link in the search field at the top of the page, and click {searchVideo}. We immediately call YouTube's public endpoint to fetch the title, channel and duration so you can confirm it's the right video before downloading.
howToDownload.step3Body: On the result page you'll see three options. {mp4} keeps the picture at the source resolution YouTube serves — up to 4K for videos that have it. When you select MP4, a quality dropdown will appear so you can choose from the resolutions YouTube has available. {mp3} keeps only the audio, encoded at 190 kbps. {libraryReady} is MP3 plus cover art, ID3 tags and synced lyrics — pick that if the file is going into a music library.
howToDownload.step3NoteBody: StroyGetter doesn't upscale or re-encode the picture. If the original on YouTube is 720p, you'll get a 720p file — even if you select a higher quality. Resolution is determined entirely by what YouTube has on their side.
howToDownload.step4Body: Click the Download button. The file is streamed directly from our converter to your browser — nothing is stored on our servers. An MP3 usually finishes in 6–10 seconds; an MP4 in 8–15 seconds; Library Ready takes about 20–30 seconds because of the metadata lookup.
howToDownload.legalBody: It depends on your jurisdiction and what you download. In most places, downloading content {youOwn}, content in the {publicDomain}, or content explicitly {licensedForDownload} is fine. Downloading copyrighted material without permission is not. StroyGetter is intended for personal and educational use only — please don't use it to infringe on anyone's rights.
howToDownload.trouble1S: Make sure the video is public and not age-restricted. Private and members-only videos cannot be fetched.
howToDownload.trouble2S: Large 4K files take longer. If you only need audio, switch to MP3 — it's typically 20× smaller.
howToDownload.trouble3S: Try VLC — it plays every MP4 and MP3 variant. If the file is 0 bytes, the conversion failed; try again.
howToDownload.trouble4S: Synced lyrics come from open music databases. Some tracks aren't indexed yet — you'll still get cover art and ID3 tags.
howToDownload.faq1A: Yes — it works on mobile Safari (iOS) and Chrome on Android. Paste the YouTube URL, pick your format, and tap Download. The file goes to your Downloads folder.
howToDownload.faq2Q: What is the maximum quality I can download?
howToDownload.faq2A: Up to 2160p (4K) for videos that have it on YouTube. We never upscale — if the original is 720p, you get a 720p file.
howToDownload.faq3A: We fetch the file from YouTube live. Speed depends on the source bitrate, our server load, and your internet connection. Library Ready adds 15–25s for the metadata lookup.
howToDownload.faq4A: Yes — Shorts are standard YouTube videos under a minute. Paste the youtu.be/shorts/ URL and it works the same way.
howToDownload.ctaDesc: Head back to the homepage and paste your YouTube URL.

howToLibrary.h1: How to download YouTube music with cover art, ID3 tags and synced lyrics
howToLibrary.intro: A complete walkthrough of StroyGetter's Library Ready mode — the only free online tool that embeds cover art, metadata and scrolling lyrics in a single click.
howToLibrary.toc3: Step 1 — Copy the YouTube music URL
howToLibrary.whatIsBody: Library Ready is StroyGetter's premium download mode. Instead of giving you a bare MP3 with no context, it fetches the track's full metadata from YouTube Music and embeds everything directly into the file before it reaches your device:
howToLibrary.whatIs1: Cover art in the highest resolution YouTube Music has
howToLibrary.whatIs2: ID3v2.4 tags — song title, artist, album, year
howToLibrary.whatIs3: Synced lyrics from LRClib, time-coded to scroll with the music
howToLibrary.whatIsResult: The result is a file that drops cleanly into Apple Music, Plex, Plexamp, Rekordbox, foobar2000 or whichever music player you love, with zero manual editing.
howToLibrary.prereq1: The URL of a public YouTube video (the music track you want)
howToLibrary.prereq2: A modern browser — Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, or their mobile counterparts
howToLibrary.prereq3: About 5 MB of free space per track
howToLibrary.step1Title: Step 1 — Copy the YouTube music URL
howToLibrary.step1Body: On desktop, click your browser's address bar while the video is open and press {cmdC} (Mac) or {ctrlC} (Windows). On the YouTube mobile app, tap {shareLink}. YouTube Music links ({musicUrl}) work too — they often give a better metadata match.
howToLibrary.step2Body: Open {siteUrl}, paste the link in the search field, and click {searchVideo}. You'll see the video title, channel and duration so you can confirm it's the right track before going any further.
howToLibrary.step3Body: On the result page you'll see three format tabs: {mp4}, {mp3} and {libraryReady}. Click Library Ready. That's all — the metadata and lyrics are fetched automatically.
howToLibrary.step3NoteBody: Library Ready makes extra calls to fetch and embed the metadata. The progress bar will move — don't close the tab. A plain MP3 is faster if you're in a hurry and don't need the tags.
howToLibrary.step4Body: Click {download}. The tagged MP3 streams directly from our converter to your browser. Once saved, drag it into your music player's library or use {addToLibrary} in Apple Music. The cover art, tags and lyrics will appear immediately, no additional steps required.
howToLibrary.playersIntro: Synced lyrics are stored as SYLT tags inside the ID3 container. Every major audiophile-grade player reads them:
howToLibrary.player1: Apple Music (macOS 12+ and iOS 16+) — lyrics tab scrolls with the track
howToLibrary.player2: Plexamp — full lyrics view with time sync
howToLibrary.player6: Standard players like VLC or Windows Media Player show the tags and artwork but skip the sync
howToLibrary.trouble1S: The track may not be indexed in LRClib yet. You still get the cover art and ID3 tags — the file is never incomplete.
howToLibrary.trouble2S: The match is done against YouTube Music's catalog. For unofficial uploads, covers or mashups the match may be off. You can edit the tags manually in your player afterward.
howToLibrary.trouble3P: Cover art missing in my player
howToLibrary.trouble3S: Some players cache thumbnails aggressively. Try removing the file, clearing the cache, and re-importing.
howToLibrary.trouble4P: Download is stuck on the progress bar
howToLibrary.trouble4S: The metadata lookup takes up to 35 s on slow servers. If it exceeds 2 minutes, try again — a retry will usually succeed immediately from cache.
howToLibrary.faq1Q: Can I use Library Ready for podcasts or non-music videos?
howToLibrary.faq1A: You can, but the metadata match won't be great. Library Ready is designed for music that exists in YouTube Music's catalog. For podcasts and lectures, plain MP3 is a better choice.
howToLibrary.faq2Q: What bitrate does Library Ready use?
howToLibrary.faq2A: 190 kbps CBR, same as the standard MP3 option. The only difference is the embedded metadata — the audio quality is identical.
howToLibrary.faq3Q: Does Library Ready work on mobile?
howToLibrary.faq3A: Yes — paste the YouTube URL in Safari (iOS) or Chrome (Android), select Library Ready on the result page, and tap Download. The tagged MP3 lands in your Downloads folder.
howToLibrary.faq4Q: What if the cover art resolution is low?
howToLibrary.faq4A: We always fetch the highest resolution YouTube Music has for that track. For older or less-popular releases the source image may be limited, but we never downscale.
howToLibrary.ctaDesc: Paste a YouTube music link and pick Library Ready — your track will be perfectly tagged in under a minute.

updates.intro: Every update, improvement and new feature — straight from the team.
updates.ctaDesc: Paste a YouTube URL and start downloading.

legal.sidebarNote: StroyGetter doesn't host video content. We're a converter, not a library.
legal.termsIntro: StroyGetter ("the Service") is a free, open-source YouTube video downloader. By using the Service, you agree to the terms below. For a detailed breakdown of permitted and prohibited uses, see the <acceptableUseLink>Acceptable use policy</acceptableUseLink>.
legal.termsMetaDesc: StroyGetter terms of use — personal and educational use only.
legal.terms01Body: You may use the Service to download videos you have the right to download — your own content, public-domain content, content explicitly licensed for download under Creative Commons or a similar license, or content you intend to use in a context that qualifies as fair use under your jurisdiction.
legal.terms02Body: Files you download via StroyGetter must not be re-uploaded, sold, sub-licensed or otherwise distributed to third parties when you don't own the underlying rights. The Service is a personal-use tool, not a commercial pipeline.
legal.terms03Body: We don't store your downloads — files are streamed directly from our converter to your browser and discarded immediately. We collect anonymous usage statistics (page views, conversion counts, error rates) via Umami, a self-hosted privacy-first analytics tool that sets no cookies and shares no data with third parties.
legal.terms04Body: StroyGetter doesn't host video content of its own. If you believe a third party is using the Service to infringe your copyright, contact us at {dmcaEmail} with the standard DMCA notice elements and we will cooperate with any legitimate takedown request.
legal.terms05Body: StroyGetter is released under the MIT license. The Service is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind — the StroyGetter maintainers are not liable for any damages arising from use of the Service, including failed conversions, corrupted files, or downloads of content you didn't have the right to retrieve.
legal.acceptableUseMetaDesc: StroyGetter acceptable use policy — what you can and cannot download with our service.
legal.acceptableUseIntro: This policy describes what you may and may not do with StroyGetter ("the Service"). Using the Service means you agree to these terms in addition to the <termsLink>Terms of use</termsLink>.
legal.acceptableUse01Body: You may use StroyGetter to download videos you have a legitimate right to access offline: content you created and uploaded yourself, videos released into the public domain, content distributed under a Creative Commons or equivalent open licence that permits downloading, and content you intend to use in a context that qualifies as fair use or fair dealing under the laws of your jurisdiction.
legal.acceptableUse02Body: You may not use StroyGetter to download content owned by a third party for the purpose of redistribution, resale, or commercial exploitation. You may not download music, films, television shows, or other works protected by copyright without the rights holder's permission. You may not use the Service to circumvent access controls or digital rights management systems beyond what is expressly permitted by applicable law.
legal.acceptableUse03Body: Downloading videos from YouTube may conflict with YouTube's Terms of Service. By using StroyGetter you acknowledge this and accept sole responsibility for ensuring your use complies with the terms of any platform from which you download content. StroyGetter and its maintainers cannot be held liable for any consequences arising from a violation of a third-party platform's terms.
legal.acceptableUse04Body: You may not use StroyGetter in an automated or scripted manner to download content at scale. The Service is intended for individual, manual use only. Automated requests that place excessive load on our infrastructure or on upstream platforms are prohibited and may result in your IP address being blocked.
legal.acceptableUse05Body: We reserve the right to suspend or restrict access to the Service for any user who violates this policy, without prior notice. If you believe a specific use case should be permitted or have questions about this policy, contact us via GitHub Issues or at {dmcaEmail}.
legal.contactMetaDesc: Get in touch with the StroyGetter team.
legal.contactIntro: StroyGetter is maintained by StroyCo as an open-source project. The best way to reach us is through GitHub.
legal.contactGithubDesc: Bug reports, feature requests, general questions
legal.cookies01Body: StroyGetter sets no first-party cookies. We have no login, no session, no preferences stored in your browser.
legal.cookies02Body: We use Umami, a self-hosted privacy-first analytics tool, to count page visits and understand which features are used most. Umami sets no cookies and collects no personal data. All data is stored exclusively on our own servers.
legal.cookies03Body: A random sample of 15 % of sessions is recorded (mouse movements, clicks, scrolls) to help us improve the interface. Text inputs are masked, recordings are capped at 5 minutes, and all data is stored on our own servers and never shared with third parties.
legal.dmcaMetaDesc: StroyGetter DMCA and copyright takedown policy.
legal.dmcaIntro: StroyGetter is a client-side conversion tool. We do not host, cache, or redistribute any video content — every download is streamed in real time from YouTube's servers to your browser and immediately discarded.
legal.dmca01Body: If you believe the Service is being used to infringe on your copyright, send a standard DMCA notice to {dmcaEmail} including: a description of the copyrighted work, the URL being misused, your contact information, and a statement of good faith. We will respond within 5 business days.
legal.dmca02Body: If you believe content was removed in error, you may file a counter-notice to the same address. We follow the safe-harbor procedures outlined in 17 U.S.C. § 512(g).
legal.privacyMetaDesc: StroyGetter privacy policy — what we collect and why.
legal.privacy01Body: We collect anonymous, aggregated usage statistics: page views, conversion type counts (MP4 / MP3 / Library Ready), and error rates. This data is processed by Umami, our self-hosted analytics tool, and contains no personally identifiable information.
legal.privacy02Body: We do not store video URLs you submit, downloaded files, IP addresses in logs, or any information that could identify you individually. Downloads are streamed in real time and never written to disk.
legal.privacy03Body: StroyGetter sets no cookies. We use Umami, a self-hosted analytics tool, which tracks page views and interactions without cookies or personal data. A 15 % sample of sessions is recorded to help improve the UI; text inputs are masked and recordings are stored on our own servers.
legal.privacy04Body: We use Umami for usage metrics. For Library Ready conversions we query open music databases (MusicBrainz, LRClib) to fetch metadata — only the track title and artist name are sent, no personal data.
legal.privacy05Body: Questions about this policy? Open an issue on GitHub or email {emailPrivacy}.

tiktok.heroDesc: The easiest way to download TikTok videos. Get a clean MP4 without the watermark, or grab the audio as MP3. No app, no extension, no account.
tiktok.heroDisclaimer: Please only download content you own or have the rights to.
tiktok.howItWorksTitle: From TikTok URL to file in three steps.
tiktok.howItWorksDesc: No browser extension, no desktop app, no signup. Everything runs in your tab.
tiktok.step1Body: Copy the link from any TikTok video — from the app or the website. Drop it in the search field above.
tiktok.step2Body: No watermark gives you the clean original. With watermark keeps the TikTok logo. Audio only extracts the sound as MP3.
tiktok.step3Body: The file streams directly to your browser. Nothing is stored on our servers. Only download content you have the rights to.
tiktok.formatsTitle: Three ways to save a TikTok.
tiktok.formatsDesc: Video at source resolution — we never re-encode. Audio at 192 kbps.
tiktok.formatsDisclaimer: Video resolution depends on the original TikTok. We never upscale or re-encode.
tiktok.formatNoWmDesc: The original video stream without the TikTok logo overlay. Best quality, clean file — ready for editing or sharing.
tiktok.formatWmDesc: The standard TikTok download with the creator watermark included. Ideal if you want to credit the original creator.
tiktok.formatAudioDesc: Just the audio track extracted from the video and converted to MP3. Great for music, voiceovers and sound effects.
tiktok.faq1A: Yes — the 'No watermark' option downloads the original video stream directly from TikTok's servers, without the overlaid logo. The watermark is never burned into this stream.
tiktok.faq2A: Standard TikTok URLs (tiktok.com/@user/video/ID) and short links (vm.tiktok.com/…) are both supported. Just paste the link from the TikTok app or website.
tiktok.faq3Q: Can I download TikTok audio only?
tiktok.faq3A: Yes — pick the 'Audio only' option to get an MP3 at 192 kbps. The video stream is discarded and only the audio track is kept.
tiktok.faq4Q: Is there a file size limit?
tiktok.faq4A: We apply a generous limit (8 GB by default) which covers any realistic TikTok video. If you hit it, the download will fail with an error.

twitch.heroDesc: Paste any Twitch clip URL. Get source-quality MP4 or MP3 audio in seconds — no account needed.
twitch.heroDisclaimer: Only download content you have the rights to. Respect Twitch's Terms of Service.
twitch.howItWorksDesc: StroyGetter fetches the clip stream directly from Twitch via yt-dlp — no browser extension, no app.
twitch.step1Body: Copy any Twitch clip URL (clips.twitch.tv/... or twitch.tv/channel/clip/...) and paste it in the search bar.
twitch.step2Body: Choose source quality, a lower resolution, or audio-only MP3. Source quality matches the original broadcast resolution.
twitch.step3Body: Click Download. The file streams directly to your device — nothing is stored on our servers.
twitch.formatsDesc: From clip source quality to lightweight audio, StroyGetter covers all your Twitch clip download needs.
twitch.formatSrcDesc: The original broadcast quality — typically 1080p60 for most streamers. No re-encoding, just the raw stream.
twitch.format720Desc: A smaller file at broadcast-standard 720p60 — ideal when storage or bandwidth is limited.
twitch.formatAudioDesc: Strip the video and export just the audio as a 192 kbps MP3 — perfect for podcasts and talk streams.
twitch.formatsDisclaimer: Available resolutions depend on the original broadcast. The quality picker shows all options automatically.
twitch.faq1Q: Can I download live streams in real time?
twitch.faq1A: No. Only clips can be downloaded. Live streams and VODs are not supported at this time.
twitch.faq2Q: Where do I find the clip URL?
twitch.faq2A: On the clip page, copy the URL from your browser address bar. It looks like clips.twitch.tv/SlugHere or twitch.tv/channelname/clip/SlugHere.
twitch.faq3Q: Why can't I find a clip?
twitch.faq3A: Clips can be deleted by the streamer or by Twitch. If the clip page returns a 404, the clip is no longer available and cannot be downloaded.
twitch.faq4Q: How many quality options will I see?
twitch.faq4A: Twitch clips typically offer 360p, 480p, 720p60 and 1080p60 (source). The quality picker shows all available resolutions automatically.
twitch.githubDesc: Star the repo, report issues, or contribute at GitHub.

nativeApp.label: Native App
nativeApp.heroDesc: The same downloader you know, packaged as a native app. Download YouTube and TikTok videos even when the server is unavailable.
nativeApp.why1Body: When the web server is down, you can't download anything. The native app runs entirely on your device — no internet required beyond fetching the video itself.
nativeApp.why2Body: No browser tab to open, no URL to type. Launch the app, paste a link, and download. It stays in your taskbar, always ready.
nativeApp.why3Body: Same design, same features. YouTube video, TikTok without watermark, audio-only — everything you're used to, wrapped in a native window.
nativeApp.downloadDesc: All binaries are free, open source, and built directly from the GitHub repository.
nativeApp.windowsDesc: Windows 10 or later. 64-bit installer, no admin rights required for portable version.
nativeApp.macosDesc: macOS 12 Monterey or later. Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel).
nativeApp.androidDesc: Android support is in progress and will ship in a future release. Follow the GitHub repository for updates.
nativeApp.sourceDesc: StroyGetter Native is fully open source. Read the code, report issues, or contribute on GitHub.
nativeApp.ctaDesc: The web downloader is always up to date and requires no install. Use it directly from your browser.
nativeApp.linuxDesc: Linux x64. AppImage runs without install; .deb package for Debian-based distributions.
nativeApp.securityTitle: How to verify the app's authenticity?
nativeApp.securityDesc: Every StroyGetter Native binary is verified by four independent methods before release. You can use any of them to confirm that what you downloaded is exactly what was built from the source code.
nativeApp.sha256Desc: Each release includes a SHA256SUMS-PLATFORM.txt file. Download it alongside the binary and run the command below to confirm the file hasn't been altered.
nativeApp.attestDesc: GitHub Attestations prove that the binary was built by the official CI pipeline from a specific commit — not assembled manually or on an untrusted machine. Requires the GitHub CLI.
nativeApp.gpgDesc: Releases are signed with GPG key 6C1D622641F44493. Import the public key from GitHub, then verify the .asc signature file included with each release.
nativeApp.virusDesc: Every binary is submitted to VirusTotal before the release is published. VirusTotal runs the file through 70+ antivirus engines simultaneously. The scan link is posted in the GitHub release description.
